description: You are a theatrical sound designer configuring the onboard audio sequence for a theme park dark ride. Using the audio files located in /home/ga/Audio/samples/, prepare the currently open Ardour session for a 30-second ride sequence. The session must include three audio tracks named 'Ambient BGM', 'Scare Left', and 'Scare Right'. On the 'Ambient BGM' track, place 'moonlight_sonata.wav' starting at 0:00.000 with the gain set to approximately -6 dB. On the 'Scare Left' track, place 'narration.wav' starting at 0:10.000 and hard-panned 100% to the Left. On the 'Scare Right' track, place 'narration.wav' starting at 0:20.000 and hard-panned 100% to the Right. Organize 'Scare Left' and 'Scare Right' into a Route Group named 'Ride Effects' with gain sharing enabled. Include session markers named 'Gargoyle' at 0:10.000 and 'Ghost' at 0:20.000. Save the session and export the result as a WAV file to /home/ga/Audio/ride_export/ride_reference.wav.
